GD-MAIN.Annotation: Portable OpenCode workflow package with plugins, a Bun CLI, semantic model roles, hashline editing, explicit work items, and managed agent workflows.

M-MODEL-ROLES.Name: ModelRoles
M-MODEL-ROLES.Purpose: Define built-in role IDs, vv-role:* syntax, model-selection parsing, role normalization, resolution helpers, and built-in agent role bindings.

M-CONFIG-LAYERS.Name: ConfigLayers
M-CONFIG-LAYERS.Purpose: Resolve vvoc and OpenCode config sources across env, project, global, and defaults plus project/global write targets.

M-CLI-CONFIG.Name: OpenCodeConfigTools
M-CLI-CONFIG.Purpose: Mutate OpenCode and vvoc config conservatively, pin package registration, write managed agent/skill registrations, render strict schema v3, and inspect installation state.
M-CLI-CONFIG.Paths: src/lib/opencode.ts, src/lib/package.ts, src/lib/vvoc-config.ts, src/lib/model-roles.ts, src/lib/vvoc-paths.ts, schemas/vvoc/v3.json
M-CLI-CONFIG.Depends: M-CONFIG-LAYERS, M-MODEL-ROLES, M-VVOC-PRESET-REGISTRY, M-CLI-MANAGED-AGENTS, M-CLI-MANAGED-SKILLS, M-CLI-AGENT-MODELS

M-RELEASE-AUTOMATION.Name: ReleaseAutomation
M-RELEASE-AUTOMATION.Purpose: Guard package releases with local version bumping, AI changelog summary generation, schema id consistency, release checks, and tag-gated publish workflow.

M-CLI-MANAGED-AGENTS.Name: ManagedAgents
M-CLI-MANAGED-AGENTS.Purpose: Define bundled vv-controller, enhancer, guardian, investigator, vv-implementer, vv-spec-reviewer, and vv-code-reviewer templates and load managed prompt text.

M-CLI-MANAGED-SKILLS.Name: ManagedSkills
M-CLI-MANAGED-SKILLS.Purpose: Define bundled vv-spec, vv-plan, vv-review, vv-execute, vv-reflect, and vv-handoff skill templates and reference loading.

M-CLI-AGENT-MODELS.Name: AgentModels
M-CLI-AGENT-MODELS.Purpose: Define supported vvoc model target IDs and shared model override validation helpers retained for current command and config compatibility.

M-PLUGIN-TOGGLE-CONFIG.Name: PluginToggleConfig
M-PLUGIN-TOGGLE-CONFIG.Purpose: Define vvoc-managed plugin toggle names, default all-true config, and pure isPluginEnabled helper.

M-CLI-COMMANDS.Name: VVOCCommands
M-CLI-COMMANDS.Purpose: Compose the vvoc CLI and expose init, install, sync, launch, status, doctor, version, role, preset, plugin, config, patch-provider, completion, guardian config, and upgrade commands.

M-PLUGIN-MODEL-ROLES.Name: ModelRolesPlugin
M-PLUGIN-MODEL-ROLES.Purpose: Resolve vv-role:* references in supported OpenCode root, agent, and command model fields using effective vvoc config source precedence.

M-CLI-ROLE.Name: RoleCommand
M-CLI-ROLE.Purpose: List, set, and unset semantic role assignments in selected vvoc config for built-in and custom roles.

M-CLI-PRESET.Name: PresetCommand
M-CLI-PRESET.Purpose: List, show, and apply declarative named role presets without mutating OpenCode config directly.

M-VVOC-PRESET-REGISTRY.Name: VvocPresetRegistry
M-VVOC-PRESET-REGISTRY.Purpose: Define canonical managed vvoc preset registry for config seeding, sync refresh, and completion.

M-PLUGIN-GUARDIAN.Name: GuardianPlugin
M-PLUGIN-GUARDIAN.Purpose: Review OpenCode permission requests with a constrained hidden Guardian subagent whose model resolves from the built-in fast role.

M-PLUGIN-HASHLINE-EDIT.Name: HashlineEditPlugin
M-PLUGIN-HASHLINE-EDIT.Purpose: Replace default edit with a hash-anchored variant and rewrite read output to line/hash/context-anchor rows to reject stale edits before file corruption.

M-PLUGIN-SYSTEM-CONTEXT-INJECTION.Name: SystemContextInjectionPlugin
M-PLUGIN-SYSTEM-CONTEXT-INJECTION.Purpose: Inject reusable main-session guidance and skill discovery paths into eligible primary agents while skipping subagents.

M-PLUGIN-SECRETS-REDACTION.Name: SecretsRedactionPlugin
M-PLUGIN-SECRETS-REDACTION.Purpose: Redact secrets from provider-bound messages and restore placeholders after completions and before local tool execution.

M-WORKFLOW-PROTOCOL.Name: WorkflowProtocol
M-WORKFLOW-PROTOCOL.Purpose: Define tracked subagent result protocol grammar, allowed statuses, strict top-block and separated-body parsing, actionable missing-blank-line diagnostics, status validation, and work-item header parsing.

M-WORKFLOW-REPAIR.Name: WorkflowRepair
M-WORKFLOW-REPAIR.Purpose: Recognize resumable OpenCode task-result envelopes and attempt one bounded same-session format repair for malformed tracked outputs, including missing-blank-line body separator guidance.

M-WORKFLOW-STATE.Name: WorkflowState
M-WORKFLOW-STATE.Purpose: Store explicit work-item state, lifecycle, reviewer roles, current round, counters, bounded result excerpts, in-flight launches, and persistence delegate integration.

M-WORKFLOW-TRANSITIONS.Name: WorkflowTransitions
M-WORKFLOW-TRANSITIONS.Purpose: Compute allowed tracked agents, reviewer role mappings, full-round settlement, hard-stop handling, and round limit checks.

M-WORKFLOW-TOOLING.Name: WorkflowTooling
M-WORKFLOW-TOOLING.Purpose: Provide work_item_open, work_item_list, and work_item_close custom tool handlers over the state store, including stable serialization of bounded recovery excerpts.

M-PLUGIN-WORKFLOW.Name: WorkflowPlugin
M-PLUGIN-WORKFLOW.Purpose: Register workflow tools, enforce tracked launch validation, parse tracked results, repair resumable malformed outputs, propagate bounded excerpts through protocol errors and hard stops, inject workflow guidance, and hydrate/snapshot state through event hooks.
M-PLUGIN-WORKFLOW.Depends: M-WORKFLOW-PROTOCOL, M-WORKFLOW-REPAIR, M-WORKFLOW-STATE, M-WORKFLOW-TRANSITIONS, M-WORKFLOW-TOOLING, M-WORKFLOW-PERSISTENCE, M-CLI-MANAGED-AGENTS, M-PLUGIN-TOGGLE-CONFIG

M-WORKFLOW-PERSISTENCE.Name: WorkflowPersistence
M-WORKFLOW-PERSISTENCE.Purpose: Hydrate and snapshot per-session workflow state, including optional bounded result excerpt fields, under $XDG_DATA_HOME/vvoc/workflow/<sessionId>/workflow-state.json and delete session directories on cleanup.

M-CLI-CONFIG-VALIDATE.Name: ConfigValidate
M-CLI-CONFIG-VALIDATE.Purpose: Validate canonical strict-current vvoc.json against schema v3 and semantic role/preset constraints.

M-CLI-PLUGIN-LIST.Name: PluginList
M-CLI-PLUGIN-LIST.Purpose: Display OpenCode plugin entries with source path, enabled status, and vvoc plugin toggle status where available.

M-CLI-PLUGIN-TOGGLE.Name: PluginToggle
M-CLI-PLUGIN-TOGGLE.Purpose: Enable or disable vvoc-managed plugins by mutating the plugins section in selected canonical vvoc config.

M-CLI-PATCH-PROVIDER.Name: PatchProvider
M-CLI-PATCH-PROVIDER.Purpose: Apply provider-specific OpenCode baseURL or alias-model patches without rewriting role-reference root model fields.

M-CLI-COMPLETION.Name: Completion
M-CLI-COMPLETION.Purpose: Install bash, zsh, and fish completions including role IDs, presets, patch-provider presets, and nested commands.

M-CLI-INIT.Name: Init
M-CLI-INIT.Purpose: Interactive or non-interactive project setup that registers the package, scaffolds managed prompts, seeds role assignments, and writes role-reference config defaults.

M-CLI-UPGRADE.Name: Upgrade
M-CLI-UPGRADE.Purpose: Check npm for newer package versions, install globally with Bun, and run follow-up sync while reporting sync failure as partial upgrade.

DataFlows.DF-PLUGIN-INSTALL: vvoc init or install resolves config paths, registers pinned plugin package, syncs managed agents and skills, writes canonical vvoc schema v3, and verifies status.
DataFlows.DF-CONFIG-SYNC: vvoc sync strict-parses current vvoc config, preserves valid role/plugin values, refreshes managed presets/prompts/skills, and rewrites OpenCode managed registrations.
DataFlows.DF-LAYERED-CONFIG: Commands and runtime resolve env overrides, nearest project layer, global layer, then defaults where permitted.
DataFlows.DF-VVOC-LAUNCH: vvoc launch selects OpenCode and vvoc config paths, sets env overrides, forwards passthrough args, and preserves child exit code.
DataFlows.DF-RELEASE: release:bump and publish workflow verify package/schema/changelog consistency before publishing.
DataFlows.DF-ROLE-MANAGEMENT: role list/set/unset loads selected vvoc config, validates role IDs, normalizes assignments, writes role map, or renders inventory.
DataFlows.DF-ROLE-RESOLUTION: ModelRolesPlugin loads role map, scans supported model fields, resolves vv-role:* references, splits variants where safe, and fails loudly for unknown roles.
DataFlows.DF-PRESET-SWITCH: Preset command reads presets, validates selected name, normalizes assignments, applies listed roles only, and leaves OpenCode config untouched.
DataFlows.DF-HASHLINE-EDIT: Hashline plugin rewrites read output to line/hash anchors, validates current anchors on edit, applies batches, and rejects stale or malformed anchors.
DataFlows.DF-GUARDIAN-REVIEW: Guardian captures permission intent, builds bounded review input, runs hidden subagent, interprets risk, and auto-replies only when safe.
DataFlows.DF-SYSTEM-CONTEXT: System context injection resolves agent identity and appends guidance only to eligible primary agents.
DataFlows.DF-SECRETS-REDACTION: SecretsRedactionPlugin redacts provider-bound payloads, restores after completions, and restores before tool execution.
DataFlows.DF-PLUGIN-LIST: Plugin list scans OpenCode config and displays source plus vvoc toggle status when selected vvoc config is valid.
DataFlows.DF-CONFIG-VALIDATE: Config validate resolves selected vvoc.json, parses strict JSON, validates schema v3 and semantic role/preset constraints.
DataFlows.DF-COMPLETION: Completion detects shell, generates completion content, writes shell-specific files, and patches shell init files idempotently when required.
DataFlows.DF-PLUGIN-TOGGLE: Plugin enable/disable resolves vvoc config, validates plugin name, writes plugins[name], and prints restart guidance.
DataFlows.DF-PLUGIN-TOGGLE-CHECK: Plugin factories load shared runtime config, call isPluginEnabled, return empty hooks when disabled, or proceed normally when enabled.
DataFlows.DF-INIT: Init chooses interactive/non-interactive path, prompts when appropriate, writes managed prompts/config, and confirms setup.
DataFlows.DF-UPGRADE: Upgrade checks npm, installs latest globally with Bun, runs fresh vvoc sync, and reports partial upgrade if sync fails.
DataFlows.DF-RENAME-AGENTS: Install/sync scaffolds vv-implementer, vv-spec-reviewer, and vv-code-reviewer names and prompt files while preserving pre-rename user-owned entries.
DataFlows.DF-WORKFLOW-TOOLS: work_item_open/list/close create, inspect, and close explicit workflow items with deterministic IDs, state metadata, review-round metadata, and bounded recovery excerpts.
DataFlows.DF-LAUNCH-ENFORCEMENT: WorkflowPlugin intercepts task launches, validates tracked subagent prompts, work-item existence, allowed transitions, and round limits.
DataFlows.DF-RESULT-PARSING: WorkflowPlugin parses tracked subagent top blocks and separated result bodies, unwraps task envelopes, attempts bounded format repair, validates identity/status, creates bounded recovery excerpts, updates state, and halts with excerpt context on protocol errors or hard-stop statuses.
DataFlows.DF-LOOP-GATE: Workflow round checks use max(specReviewCount, codeReviewCount) and block round three.
DataFlows.DF-WORKFLOW-GUIDANCE: WorkflowPlugin injects protocol guidance into vv-controller and skips helper primaries and subagents.
DataFlows.DF-WORKFLOW-PERSISTENCE: Workflow persistence hydrates per-session state including optional bounded excerpt fields, snapshots after mutations, switches session stores, and cleans deleted session data.

ManualReview.Item: Function-level START_CONTRACT and START_BLOCK anchors remain source-local navigation structure and are intentionally not expanded into separate graph modules.
